title: Cosmos Decorations

# **Cosmos Decorations**

### **Notices**

Cosmos Decorations is now available for **1.21.1**.

### **Description**

Cosmos Decorations is a lightweight mod which adds various decorative blocks, such as stairs and slabs for Vanilla Blocks, stone variants for various Vanilla Blocks and more.

### **Dependencies**

Cosmos Decorations requires **Cosmos Library** in order to function, please download the latest version [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/cosmos-library).

## **The Cosmos Series**

This mod is part of **[The Cosmos Series](https://modrinth.com/organization/the-cosmos-series)**.
